title: blechnum lanuginosum
intro: Blechnum lanuginosum, also known as the woolly chain fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Consuming or applying herbal preparations of Blechnum lanuginosum may help alleviate conditions such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as providing antioxidant and detoxifying effects. In herbal medicine, Blechnum lanuginosum can be prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used as a dried powder or extract.
